title: Moroccan Crumble Date Cake
description: A sweet and comforting Moroccan-inspired cake made with crumbled pastry and topped with dates.
instructions: Grease a 9-inch round cake pan and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and crumbled pastry.
Add the softened butter and mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Stir in the chopped dates and vanilla extract.
Beat in the egg until the mixture is smooth.
Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and smooth the top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes.
Transfer the cake to a wire rack to cool completely.
